# Forced Alignment Core (compat shim)


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

``` python
# Shim verification: class-identity + typed wire round-trip with
# nested item re-typing.
import json as _json
import cjm_forced_alignment_adapter_interface.core as _new
from cjm_plugin_system.core.wire import wire_encode, wire_decode, WIRE_KIND_KEY

assert ForcedAlignItem is _new.ForcedAlignItem
assert ForcedAlignResult is _new.ForcedAlignResult
res = ForcedAlignResult(items=[ForcedAlignItem('hi', 0.0, 0.4)])
env = wire_encode(res)
assert env[WIRE_KIND_KEY] == 'forced_alignment.result'
back = wire_decode(_json.loads(_json.dumps(env)))
assert isinstance(back, ForcedAlignResult)
assert isinstance(back.items[0], ForcedAlignItem) and back == res
print('forced_alignment_core shim OK')
```
